headline: Leidos Holdings: The Unseen Cash Flow Machine Fueling Aggressive Buybacks In Defense
summary: Leidos looks deeply undervalued: strong free cash flow, recession-proof defense contracts, and a big backlog. Click to read more on LDOS.
